message:
test(connectors): expand remaining 31 connectors to 160+ tests each

All 78 connectors now at 160+ unit tests. Connectors expanded:
1password(160), airtable(161), annas-archive(161), browser(184),
discord(160), github(172), linkedin(160), llm-router(161),
make(160), mixpanel(167), notion(161), retool(167), s3(161),
slack(162), twilio(162), youtube(176), plus fixes for datadog,
hubspot, pulumi, google-ai, google-calendar, twitter, gmail,
todoist, grafana, intercom, posthog, qdrant, elasticsearch,
pandadoc, reddit.

All clippy clean with -D warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
